subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord of humanity and Master of destiny's mysteries! All atoms bear witness to Thy grace and loving-kindness and acknowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا سید البشر و مالک اسرار القدر تشهد کل الذرات بفضلک و عنایتک و تعرف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for parents
